heading: Acquisition of site for and operation of Center
label: 407cc Acquisition of site for and operation of Center

children.text: using an existing structure or modifying an existing structure for use; or
constructing a new structure to house the Center. The Secretary may acquire such land as is necessary to provide a site for the Center.

children.heading: Provision of funds to Center
children.label: b Provision of funds to Center
children.text: The Secretary is authorized to make grants to, and enter into cooperative agreements, contracts or leases with the National Constitution Center, Philadelphia, Pennsylvania, which shall operate the Center as provided in this subchapter in order to carry out the purposes of this subchapter. Funds authorized to be appropriated under this subchapter may be made available to the National Constitution Center only to the extent that they are matched by such entity with funds from nonfederal sources.
